name: neolinkapi-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the Java and Node.js NeoLinkAPI implementations.

scripts.build:all: node scripts/run-gradle.cjs build && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/nodejs/tsconfig.json
scripts.test:all: node scripts/run-gradle.cjs test && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/nodejs/tsconfig.json && node --test packages/nodejs/dist/test/*.js
scripts.build:all:offline: node scripts/run-gradle.cjs build --offline && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/nodejs/tsconfig.json
scripts.test:all:offline: node scripts/run-gradle.cjs test --offline && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/nodejs/tsconfig.json && node --test packages/nodejs/dist/test/*.js
